title: PlusOne Program with MS in Health Informatics - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
PlusOne Program with MS in Health Informatics - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
PlusOne Program with MS in Health Informatics
In our PlusOne Accelerated Master’s Program, you can start earning your MS in Health Informatics during your undergraduate studies. As you build your foundation in programming, data, and technology, you can take up to four graduate-level courses and apply them to both your undergraduate and graduate degrees. This reduces the time to complete your master’s from two years to one, giving you a head start toward a fulfilling tech-driven career in health care.

Deadlines
Deadlines
Learn more about our undergraduate early action, early decision, and regular decision options.
Explore deadlines
Eligibility and admissions
Eligibility and admissions
All Khoury College undergraduate degrees are eligible for the PlusOne with Health Informatics. Students must have a minimum GPA of 3.0 to apply to the program.
For more information, contact
Jay Spitulnik
, director of the Health Informatics graduate program.
Campus location
Boston
Located in the heart of Boston, Northeastern’s oldest campus is home to a vibrant community of students, researchers, and faculty working across disciplines to build a better world through CS.
